description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The aircraft features a glazed, forward-mounted cockpit with a blue-tinted canopy and a two-blade propeller at the nose. The wings are straight and extend laterally from the lower part of the fuselage, with visible registration markings and insignia on the upper surfaces. The tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, with a German flag on the tail fin. The landing gear is fixed and consists of two main wheels and a smaller tail wheel. The exterior is primarily metallic silver with blue and green accents around the nose and cockpit.
description: A small, low-wing, single-propeller airplane with a blue-tinted cockpit, fixed landing gear, and a metallic silver body with blue and green accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the propeller, blue-tinted cockpit canopy, and the full wingspan.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the registration markings, German flag on the tail, and the fixed landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the main landing gear.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cockpit, propeller, and additional registration markings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a blue-tinted canopy.
